heading: Unrealized receivables and inventory items
label: 751 Unrealized receivables and inventory items
notes: Amendments2018—Subsec. (c). substituted “and sections” for “and, sections” in two places in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 115–1412004—Subsec. (d)(2) to (4). inserted “and” at end of par. (2), redesignated par. (4) as (3) and substituted “paragraph (1) or (2)” for “paragraph (1), (2), or (3)”, and struck out former par. (3) which read as follows: “any other property of the partnership which, if sold or exchanged by the partnership, would result in a gain taxable under subsection (a) of section 1246 (relating to gain on foreign investment company stock), and”.Pub. L. 108–3571999—Subsec. (d)(1). substituted “section 1221(a)(1)” for “section 1221(1)”.Pub. L. 106–1701998—Subsec. (c). substituted “731, 732,” for “731” wherever appearing in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 105–2061997—Subsec. (a)(2). , amended par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (2) read as follows: “inventory items of the partnership which have appreciated substantially in value,”.Pub. L. 105–34, § 1062(a)Subsec. (b)(1). , added subpars. (A) and (B) and struck out former subpars. (A) and (B) which read as follows:Pub. L. 105–34, § 1062(b)(1)(A)“(A) partnership property described in subsection (a)(1) or (2) in exchange for all or a part of his interest in other partnership property (including money), or“(B) partnership property (including money) other than property described in subsection (a)(1) or (2) in exchange for all or a part of his interest in partnership property described in subsection (a)(1) or (2),”.Subsec. (b)(3). , added par. (3).Pub. L. 105–34, § 1062(b)(1)(B)Subsec. (d). , amended heading and text of subsec. (d) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (d) consisted of pars. (1) and (2) relating to inventory items which have appreciated substantially in value.Pub. L. 105–34, § 1062(b)(2)1993—Subsec. (c). , in concluding provisions, substituted “section 731 or 741” for “section 731, 736, or 741” in two places and “, sections 731 and 741 (but not for purposes of section 736)” for “sections 731, 736, and 741” in two places.Pub. L. 103–66, § 13262(b)(1)Subsec. (d)(1). , amended heading and text of par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Inventory items of the partnership shall be considered to have appreciated substantially in value if their fair market value exceeds—Pub. L. 103–66, § 13206(e)(1)“(A) 120 percent of the adjusted basis to the partnership of such property, and“(B) 10 percent of the fair market value of all partnership property, other than money.”Subsec. (e). , substituted “sections 731 and 741” for “sections 731, 736, and 741”.Pub. L. 103–66, § 13262(b)(2)(A)1986—Subsec. (c). , substituted “section 617(f)(2)), stock” for “section 617(f)(2), stock” in second sentence.Pub. L. 99–514, § 1899A(19), struck out “section 1245 recovery property (as defined in section 1245(a)(5)),” before “stock in certain foreign corporations” in second sentence.Pub. L. 99–514, § 201(d)(10)1984—Subsec. (c). , struck out “farm recapture property (as defined in section 1251(e)(1)),” before “farm land”, and “1251(c),” after “1250(a),” in second sentence.Pub. L. 98–369, § 492(b)(4), inserted last sentence.Pub. L. 98–369, § 43(c)(3)Subsec. (f). , added subsec. (f).Pub. L. 98–369, § 76(a)1983—Subsec. (c). inserted reference to section 1245 recovery property (as defined in section 1245(a)(5)) in second sentence.Pub. L. 97–4481978—Subsec. (c). substituted “oil, gas, or geothermal property” for “oil or gas property” in second sentence.Pub. L. 95–618Subsec. (e). added subsec. (e).Pub. L. 95–6001976—Subsec. (b)(1). , struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455, § 1906(b)(13)(A)Subsec. (c). , §§ 205(b), 1042(c)(2), 1101(d)(2), 1901(a)(93), 2110(a), in second sentence, inserted reference to stock in a DISC (as described in section 992(a)), reference to stock in certain foreign corporations (as described in section 1248), and reference to farm land (as defined in section 1252(a)), franchises, trademarks or trade names (referred to in section 1253(a)), and an oil or gas property (described in section 1254), substituted “1252(a), 1253(a), or 1254(a)” for “or 1252(a)”, and inserted “1248(a),” after “1245(a),” and “995(c),” after “617(d)(1),”.Pub. L. 94–4551969—Subsec. (c). , in second sentence, substituted “section 1250 property (as defined in section 1250(c)), farm recapture property (as defined in section 1251(e)(1)), and farm land (as defined in section 1252(a))”, and “1250(a), 1251(c), or 1252(a)”, for “and section 1250 property (as defined in section 1250(c))” and “1250(a)”, respectively.Pub. L. 91–1721966—Subsec. (c). , in second sentence, inserted reference to mining property (as defined in section 617(f)(2)) and to section 617(d)(1).Pub. L. 89–5701964—Subsec. (c). , in second sentence, inserted reference to section 1250.Pub. L. 88–2721962—Subsec. (c). , defined “unrealized receivables” for purposes of this section and section 731, 736, and 741, as including section 1245 property, but only to the extent of the amount which would be treated as gain to which section 1245(a) would apply if (at the time of the transaction described in this section or section 731, 736, or 741, as the case may be) such property had been sold by the partnership at its fair market value.Pub. L. 87–834, § 13(f)(1)Subsec. (d)(2). , added subpar. (C), redesignated former subpar. (C) as (D), and substituted “subparagraph (A), (B), or (C)” for “subparagraph (A) or (B)”.Pub. L. 87–834, § 14(b)(2)

children.heading: Sale or exchange of interest in partnership
children.label: a Sale or exchange of interest in partnership

children.text: unrealized receivables of the partnership, or

children.heading: Certain distributions treated as sales or exchanges
children.label: b Certain distributions treated as sales or exchanges
ii
children.text: inventory items which have appreciated substantially in value,

children.label: B
children.text: partnership property (including money) other than property described in subparagraph (A)(i) or (ii) in exchange for all or a part of his interest in partnership property described in subparagraph (A)(i) or (ii),

children.label: A
children.text: a distribution of property which the distributee contributed to the partnership, or

children.label: B
children.text: payments, described in section 736(a), to a retiring partner or successor in interest of a deceased partner.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Inventory items of the partnership shall be considered to have appreciated substantially in value if their fair market value exceeds 120 percent of the adjusted basis to the partnership of such property.

children.heading: Certain property excluded
children.label: B Certain property excluded
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), there shall be excluded any inventory property if a principal purpose for acquiring such property was to avoid the provisions of this subsection relating to inventory items.
goods delivered, or to be delivered, to the extent the proceeds therefrom would be treated as amounts received from the sale or exchange of property other than a capital asset, or
services rendered, or to be rendered.
property of the partnership of the kind described in section 1221(a)(1),
any other property of the partnership which, on sale or exchange by the partnership, would be considered property other than a capital asset and other than property described in section 1231, and
any other property held by the partnership which, if held by the selling or distributee partner, would be considered property of the type described in paragraph (1) or (2).

children.heading: Limitation on tax attributable to deemed sales of section 1248 stock
children.label: e Limitation on tax attributable to deemed sales of section 1248 stock
children.text: For purposes of applying this section and sections 731 and 741 to any amount resulting from the reference to section 1248(a) in the second sentence of subsection (c), in the case of an individual, the tax attributable to such amount shall be limited in the manner provided by subsection (b) of section 1248 (relating to gain from certain sales or exchanges of stock in certain foreign corporation).

children.heading: Special rules in the case of tiered partnerships, etc.
children.label: f Special rules in the case of tiered partnerships, etc.
